zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Packard於1620年出生在英國時，她的父親William Haskell46歲，母親Elinor Fowie34歲。她於大約1637年與Richard Evans在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1661年2月11日之前在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可多爾斯特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Packard于1620年出生在英国时，她的父亲William Haskell46岁，母亲Elinor Fowie34岁。她于大约1637年与Richard Evans在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1661年2月11日之前在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可多爾斯特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Packard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pak(e) ‘pack, bundle’ + the Anglo-Norman French pejorative suffix -ard, probably a derogatory occupational name for a peddler.
English: pejorative derivative of the Middle English personal name   Pack  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Packert, Päckert, from ancient Germanic personal names formed with a word meaning ‘battle’ or ‘to fight’; or a variant of Packer 2 (with excrescent -t).

variants.name: Pack
meanings: English (Kent and Devon): variant of Pask , derived from Middle English Pake ‘Easter, Passover’.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a wholesale trader, from Middle Low German packe, German Pack ‘bundle, package’ (see Packer ). Compare Pak .
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of   Pak  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Packard was born in 1620, in England, her father, William Haskell, was 46 and her mother, Elinor Fowie, was 34. She married Richard Evans about 1637, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 11 February 1661, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, and was buried in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Packard est née en 1620, à Angleterre, son père, William Haskell, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elinor Fowie, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Evans environ 1637, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 11 février 1661, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, et a été enterrée à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Packard 1620 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Haskell 46 und ihre Mutter Elinor Fowie 34. Sie hat um 1637 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Richard Evans geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 11. Februar 1661 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Evans circa 1637, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Packardが1620年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Haskellは46歳，母Elinor Fowieは34歳であった。約1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターでRichard Evansと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1661年2月11日以前にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクドールチェスターで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터
ko.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리
ko.Berwick St. John, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 버윅 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Packard(이)가 1620년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Haskell(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elinor Fowie(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 Richard Evans(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1661년 2월 11일 이전 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 도르체스터에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Packard nasceu em 1620, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Haskell, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elinor Fowie, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Evans aproximadamente 1637, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 11 de fevereiro de 1661, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultada em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Packard родилась в 1620 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Haskell было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor Fowie, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Evans около 1637 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 11 февраль 1661 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты и была похоронена в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Packard nació en 1620, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Haskell, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elinor Fowie, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Richard Evans aproximadamente 1637, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 11 de febrero de 1661, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, y fue sepultada en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
